summary: Frontend RTL/LTR testing completed successfully. All P0 issues (RTL tabs positioning, logo visibility, header alignment) are fixed and working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: RTL implementation is clean and well-structured using CSS selectors with html[dir='rtl'] prefix
EmptyState component is properly implemented in both AdminDashboard.js and ClientDashboard.js
Translation keys for empty states are complete in both English and Arabic
LanguageSwitcher properly updates document.documentElement.dir for RTL/LTR switching
seed_data_creation: Existing data in database - forms, quotations, contracts already present
context_for_next_testing_agent: RTL/LTR layout testing completed. All features verified: 1) RTL tabs on RIGHT side (justify-content: flex-end), 2) LTR tabs on LEFT side (justify-content: flex-start), 3) Logo has white background container, 4) Header elements properly aligned in both modes, 5) Language switcher works correctly. Empty states could not be visually verified as database has existing data, but code review confirms EmptyState component is properly implemented with correct translation keys.

language_switcher.dropdown_display: PASS - shows Arabic and English with flags
language_switcher.rtl_to_ltr_switch: PASS - direction changes from rtl to ltr
language_switcher.ltr_to_rtl_switch: PASS - direction changes from ltr to rtl

empty_states.translation_keys: PASS - All keys present in en and ar translations
